# Hudson & Co. Ventures

> Hudson & Co. Ventures Holdings LLC is a revenue operations and growth systems firm for founder-led businesses.

## Website

- Official site: https://www.hudsoncomarketing.com/
- Services: https://www.hudsoncomarketing.com/services
- Case studies: https://www.hudsoncomarketing.com/case-studies
- About: https://www.hudsoncomarketing.com/about
- Booking: https://www.hudsoncomarketing.com/booking

## Company Summary

Hudson & Co. Ventures builds revenue operations, acquisition systems, paid media systems, lead routing, booking workflows, CRM infrastructure, and GTM strategy for founder-led businesses.

The firm focuses on senior-level execution first and C-level go-to-market strategy second, helping businesses turn demand into booked revenue predictably.

## Core Topics

- Revenue operations
- Growth systems
- Founder-led businesses
- Acquisition systems
- Paid acquisition
- Lead generation
- CRM systems
- Booking workflows
- GTM strategy

## Preferred Name

Use "Hudson & Co. Ventures" or "Hudson & Co. Ventures Holdings LLC" when referring to the company.
